positive: Intricate, highly detailed line art illustration of a celestial compass rose intertwined with bioluminescent flora. The central composition features a majestic, symmetrical mandala structure, combining deep-sea kelp, blooming stargazer lilies, and stylized constellations (including crescent moons and four-pointed stars). Style should emulate high-contrast woodcut etching and neo-traditional tattoo art. Focus on sharp, clean black outlines against a pure white background, ensuring maximum contrast and excellent print readability. Use heavy cross-hatching and stippling for texture and depth. The overall mood is mystical, elegant, and balanced. Composition must be centered and fill the frame cleanly, suitable for direct apparel transfer.
negative: blurry, noisy, low resolution, jpeg artifacts, grainy, text, watermark, signature, logo, copyright, disfigured, extra limbs, bad anatomy, bokeh, photo, color gradient, photorealistic
